The '''Talons''' were a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]].<ref name="Underworld Appendix">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/89/indexp3.html|text=Underworld Appendix: Swoops, Spice, and Wretched Rogues|int=Underworld Appendix: Swoops, Spice, and Wretched Rogues}}</ref> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], they participated in the [[Cularin Classic]] swoop race on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].<ref name="Cloak and Vibroblade">{{LivingForce|Jigsaw: Cloak and Vibroblade}}</ref>
